 </h1>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-500 font-medium italic mt-1\">{t('music.playerSubtitle')}</p>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"flex gap-4 w-full md:w-auto\">\n          <div         placeholder={t('common.search')} \n              value={searchTerm}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full pl-12 pr-6 py-4 bg-white  <Save size={18} /> {t('music.addTrack')} OSS!\n          </button>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst MusicPlayer: React.FC = () => {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n => [...prev, trackWithId]);\n  };\n\n  const dynamicCategories = useMemo(() => {\n    const base = [\n      { id: 'all', name: t('common.all'), icon: <ListMusic size={18} />, color: 'text-slate-500',  <Save size={18} /> {t('music.addTrack')} OSS!\n          </button>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst MusicPlayer: React.FC = () => {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n => [...prev, trackWithId]);\n  };\n\n  const dynamicCategories = useMemo(() => {\n    const base = [\n      { id: 'all', name: t('common.all'), icon: <ListMusic size={18} />, color: 'text-slate-500', icon: <Dumbbell size={18} />, color: 'text-blue-500', bg: 'bg-blue-50' },\n      { id: 'sparring', name: t('music.sparring'), icon: <HandMetal size={18} />, color: 'text-red-500', bg: 'bg-red-50' },\n      { id: 'kids', name: t('common.kids'), icon: <Baby size={18} />, color: 'text-yellow-500', bg: 'bg-yellow-50' },\n      { id: 'cooldown', name: t('music.cooldown'), icon: <Wind size={18} />, color: 'text-cyan-500', bg: 'bg-cyan-50' },\n    ];\n    \n    const baseIds = base.map(b => b.id);\n    const uniqueCustom = Array.from(new Set<string>(tracks.map(t => t.category))).filter(c => !baseIds.includes(c));\n    \n    const custom = uniqueCustom.map(c => ({\n      id: c,\n      name: c,\n      icon: <Music2 size={18} />,\n      color: 'text-purple-500',\n      bg: 'bg-purple-50'\n    }));\n\n    return [...base, ...custom];\n  }, [tracks, t]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-8 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500 pb-12 w-full overflow-x-hidden\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row items-start md:items-center justify-between gap-6\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black dark:text-white flex items-center gap-3 uppercase tracking-tighter\">\n            <Music2 className=\"text-blue-600\" size={32} /> {t('music.playlists')}\n          </h1>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-500 font-medium italic mt-1\">{t('music.playerSubtitle')}</p>\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"flex gap-4 w-full md:w-auto\">\n          <div className=\"relative flex-1 md:w-80\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400\" size={18} />\n            <input \n              type=\"text\" \n              placeholder={t('common.search')} \n              value={searchTerm}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full pl-12 pr-6 py-4 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 dark:text-white font-bold\"\n            />\n          </div>\n          <button \n            onClick={() => setIsModalOpen(true)}\n            className=\"flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-900 dark:bg-blue-600 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-2xl font-black shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest hover:-rotate-3\"\n          >\n            <PlusCircle size={18} /> {t('music.newCollection')}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8\">\n        <div className=\"lg:col-span-3 space-y-6\">\n          <h3 className=\"text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400   }));\n\n    return [...base, ...custom];\n  }, [tracks, t]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-8 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500 pb-12 w-full placeholder={t('common.search')} \n              value={searchTerm}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"w-full pl-12 pr-6 py-4 bg-white JSON.parse(saved) : DEFAULT_LIBRARY;\n    } catch (e) {\n      return DEFAULT_LIBRARY;\n    }\n  });\n\n  const audioRef = useRef<HTMLAudioElement | null>(null);\n  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    localStorage.setItem('oss_mat_beats', JSON.stringify(tracks.filter(t => t.type !== 'local')));\n  }, [tracks]);\n\n  const filteredTracks = track.artist.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());\n      const matchesCategory = selectedPlaylist === 'all' || track.category === selectedPlaylist;\n      return matchesSearch && matchesCategory;\n    });\n  }, [selectedPlaylist, searchTerm, tracks]);\n\n  const currentTrack = filteredTracks[currentTrackIndex] || filteredTracks[0];\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (audioRef.current) {\n      audioRef.current.volume = isMuted ? 0 : volume;\n    }\n  }, [volume, isMuted]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (audioRef.current && currentTrack?.type !== 'youtube') {\n      audioRef.current.src = currentTrack.url;\n      if (isPlaying) {\n        audioRef.current.play().catch(() => setIsPlaying(false));\n      }\n    }\n  }, [currentTrack]);\n\n  const togglePlay = () => {\n    if (currentTrack?.type === 'youtube') return; // YouTube usa seu próprio controle (Iframe)\n    if (!audioRef.current || !currentTrack) return;\n    if (isPlaying) {\n      audioRef.current.pause();\n    } else {\n      audioRef.current.play().catch(() => setIsPlaying(false));\n    }\n    setIsPlaying(!isPlaying);\n  };\n\n  const handleFileUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    const files = e.target.files;\n    if (!files) return;\n\n    // Explicitly casting the file object to 'File' to resolve type errors in line 115-118\n    const newTracks: EnhancedTrack[] = Array.from(files).map((file: File) => ({\n      id: `local-${Date.now()}-${file.name}`,\n      title: file.name.replace(/\\.[^/.]+$/, \"\"),\n      artist: 'Arquivo Local',\n      url: URL.createObjectURL(file),\n      duration: 0,\n      category: 'local',\n      type: 'local'\n    }));\n\n    setTracks(prev => [...newTracks, ...prev]);\n    setCurrentTrackIndex(0);\n    setIsPlaying(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleAddYoutube = () => {\n    if (!youtubeLink.includes('youtube.com') && !youtubeLink.includes('youtu.be')) {\n      alert('Por favor, insira um link válido do YouTube.');\n      return;\n    }\n\n    let videoId = '';\n    if (youtubeLink.includes('v=')) {\n      videoId = youtubeLink.split('v=')[1].split('&')[0];\n    } else {\n      videoId = youtubeLink.split('/').pop() || '';\n    }\n\n    const newTrack: EnhancedTrack = {\n      id: `yt-${videoId}`,\n      title: `YouTube: ${videoId}`,\n      artist: 'YouTube Video',\n      url: youtubeLink,\n      youtubeId: videoId,\n      duration: 0,\n      category: 'youtube',\n      type: 'youtube'\n    };\n\n    setTracks(prev => [newTrack, ...prev]);\n    setYoutubeLink('');\n    setCurrentTrackIndex(0);\n  };\n\n  const handleTimeUpdate = () => {\n    if (audioRef.current) {\n      const p = (audioRef.current.currentTime / (audioRef.current.duration || 1)) * 100;\n      setProgress(p || 0);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSeek = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    if (audioRef.current && !isNaN(audioRef.current.duration)) {\n      const time = (parseFloat(e.target.value) / 100) * audioRef.current.duration;\n      audioRef.current.currentTime = time;\n      setProgress(parseFloat(e.target.value));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const nextTrack = () => {\n    if (filteredTracks.length <= 1) return;\n    setCurrentTrackIndex((prev) => (prev + 1) % filteredTracks.length);\n  };\n\n  const prevTrack = () => {\n    if (filteredTracks.length <= 1) return;\n    setCurrentTrackIndex((prev) => (prev - 1 + filteredTracks.length) % filteredTracks.length);\n  };\n\n  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {\n    if (!seconds || isNaN(seconds)) return '0:00';\n    const m = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    const s = Math.floor(seconds % 60);\n    return `${m}:${s < 10 ? X, \n  Wallet,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Plus,\n  CheckCircle,\n  AlertCircle,\n  FileSpreadsheet,\n  Copy\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useTranslation } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\nimport { useTranslation } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\n\nconst ReportCard = ({ title, icon, children, footer }: any) => {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-[3rem] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col transition-colors\">\n      <div className=\"p-8 border-b border-slate-50 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-50/30 dark:bg-slate-800/30\">\n        <h3 className=\"font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs flex items-center gap-3\">\n          {icon} {title}\n        </h3>\n        <button className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors\"><Download size={18} /></button>\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"p-8 flex-1 min-h-[350px]\">\n        {children}\n      </div>\n      {footer && <div className=\"px-8 py-5 bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border-t border-slate-50 dark:border-slate-800\">{footer}</div>}\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst Reports: React.FC = () => {\n  const { students, payments } = useData();\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const [activeReport, setActiveReport] = useState<'main' | 'birthdays'>('main');\n  const [selectedMonth, setSelectedMonth] = useState(new Date().getMonth());\n\n  const months = [\n    \"Janeiro\", \"Fevereiro\", \"Março\", \"Abril\", \"Maio\", \"Junho\",\n    \"Julho\", \"Agosto\", \"Setembro\", \"Outubro\", \"Novembro\", \"Dezembro\"\n  ];\n\n  const beltDistributionData = useMemo(() => {\n    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};\n    students.forEach(s => {\n      counts[s.belt] = (counts[s.belt] || 0) + 1;\n    });\n    return Object.entries(counts).map(([name, value]) => ({ \n      name: t(`belts.${name}`), \n      value,\n      color: name === 'White' ? '#cbd5e1' : \n             name === 'Blue' ? '#2563eb' : \n             name === 'Purple' ? '#7e22ce' : \n             name === 'Brown' ? '#78350f' : '#0f172a'\n    }));\n  }, [students, t]);\n\n  const revenueData = useMemo(() => {\n    return payments.slice(-6).map(p => ({\n      month: p.date.split('-')[2] + '/' + p.date.split('-')[1],\n      revenue: p.amount\n    }));\n  }, [payments]);\n\n  const monthlyBirthdays = useMemo(() => {\n    return students.filter(s => {\n      if (!s.birthDate) return false;\n      return new Date(s.birthDate).getMonth() === selectedMonth;\n    }).sort((a, b) => new Date(a.birthDate).getDate() - new Date(b.birthDate).getDate());\n  }, [students, selectedMonth]);\n\n  const attendanceHeatData = [\n    { day: t('common.today'), am: 15, noon: 20, pm: 45 },\n    { day: 'Mon', am: 12, noon: 18, pm: 40 },\n    { day: 'Tue', am: 18, noon: 22, pm: 50 },\n    { day: 'Wed', am: 10, noon: 15, pm: 38 },\n    { day: 'Thu', am: 20, noon: 25, pm: 55 },\n    { day: 'Fri', am: 25, noon: 10, pm: 0 },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-10 pb-20 animate-in fade-in duration-700\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-4xl font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none\">{t('reports.title')}</h1>\n          <p className=\"text-slate-500 font-medium italic mt-2\">{t('reports.subtitle')}</p>\n        </div>\n        \n        <div className=\"flex bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-2xl p-1 shadow-sm\">\n           <button \n            onClick={() => setActiveReport('main')}\n            className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${activeReport === 'main' ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400'}`}\n           >\n             <BarChart3 size={16} className=\"inline mr-2\" /> Analítico\n           </button>\n           <button \n            onClick={() => setActiveReport('birthdays')}\n            className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${activeReport === 'birthdays' ? 'bg-amber-500 text-white shadow-lg' : 'text-slate-400'}`}\n           >\n             <Cake size={16} className=\"inline mr-2\" /> {t('reports.birthdays')}\n           </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {activeReport === 'main' ? (\n        <>\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8\">\n            <ReportCard \n              title={t('reports.revenueStream')} \n              icon={<BarChart3 size={18} className=\"text-green-500\" />}\n              footer={<div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-green-600 font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest\"><TrendingUp size={16}/> {t('reports.marketConfidence')}</div>}\n            >\n               <ResponsiveContainer width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n                 <AreaChart data={revenueData.length > 0 ? revenueData : [{month: 'N/A', revenue: 0}]}>\n                   <defs>\n                     <linearGradient id=\"colorRev\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">\n                       <stop offset=\"5%\" stopColor=\"#2563eb\" stopOpacity={0.15}/>\n                       <stop offset=\"95%\" stopColor=\"#2563eb\" stopOpacity={0}/>\n                     </linearGradient>\n                   </defs>\n                   <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray=\"3 3\" vertical={false} stroke=\"#e2e8f0\" opacity={0.5} />\n                   <XAxis dataKey=\"month\" axisLine={false} tickLine={false} tick={{fill: '#94a3b8', fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '900'}} dy={15} />\n                   <YAxis hide />\n                   <Tooltip \n                     contentStyle={{borderRadius: '24px', border: 'none', boxShadow: '0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)', background: '#1e293b', color: '#fff'}}\n                     itemStyle={{fontWeight: '900', fontSize: '12px', color: '#fff', textTransform: 'uppercase'}}\n                     labelStyle={{display: 'none'}}\n                   />\n                   <Area type=\"monotone\" dataKey=\"revenue\" stroke=\"#2563eb\" strokeWidth={5} fillOpacity={1} fill=\"url(#colorRev)\" />\n                 </AreaChart>\n               </ResponsiveContainer>\n            </ReportCard>\n\n            <ReportCard title={t('reports.beltPopulation')} icon={<PieIcon size={18} className=\"text-blue-600\" />}>\n              <div className=\"flex h-full items-center flex-col sm:flex-row\">\n                <div className=\"w-full sm:w-1/2 h-full min-h-[250px]\">\n                  <ResponsiveContainer width=\"100%\" height=\"100%\">\n                    <PieChart>\n                      <Pie\n                        data={beltDistributionData}\n                        innerRadius={70}\n                        outerRadius={110}\n                        paddingAngle={8}\n                        dataKey=\"value\"\n                        stroke=\"none\"\n                      >\n                        {beltDistributionData.map((entry, index) => (\n                          <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={entry.color} />\n                        ))}\n                      </Pie>\n                      <Tooltip \n                        contentStyle={{borderRadius: '20px', border: 'none', boxShadow: '0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)', fontWeight: '900'}}\n                      />\n                    </PieChart>\n                  </ResponsiveContainer>\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"w-full sm:w-1/2 space-y-4 px-4 sm:px-8 mt-6 sm:mt-0\">\n                   {beltDistributionData.map((b) => (\n                     <div key={b.name} className=\"flex items-center justify-between group\">\n                       <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n                         <div className=\"w-4 h-4 rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700 transition-transform group-hover:scale-125\" style={{backgroundColor: b.color}} />\n                         <span className=\"text-[10px] font-black text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">{b.name}</span>\n                       </div>\n                       <span className=\"text-sm font-black dark:text-white tracking-tighter\">{b.value}</span>\n                     </div>\n                   ))}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </ReportCard>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-8\">\n            <ReportCard title={t('reports.attendanceHeatmap')} icon={<Users size={18} className=\"text-orange-500\" />}>\n               <ResponsiveContainer width=\"100%\" height={300}>\n                 <BarChart data={attendanceHeatData}>\n                   <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray=\"3 3\" vertical={false} stroke=\"#e2e8f0\" opacity={0.5} />\n                   <XAxis dataKey=\"day\" axisLine={false} tickLine={false} tick={{fill: '#94a3b8', fontSize: 10, fontWeight: '900'}} dy={15} />\n                   <Tooltip \n                     cursor={{fill: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.05)'}}\n                     contentStyle={{borderRadius: '20px', border: 'none', boxShadow: '0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'}}\n                   />\n                   <Bar dataKey=\"am\" stackId=\"a\" fill=\"#93c5fd\" radius={[0, 0, 0, 0]} />\n                   <Bar dataKey=\"noon\" stackId=\"a\" fill=\"#3b82f6\" radius={[0, 0, 0, 0]} />\n                   <Bar dataKey=\"pm\" stackId=\"a\" fill=\"#1d4ed8\" radius={[12, 12, 0, 0]} />\n                 </BarChart>\n               </ResponsiveContainer>\n               <div className=\"flex justify-center flex-wrap gap-8 mt-10\">\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"><div className=\"w-4 h-4 bg-blue-300 rounded-lg shadow-sm\"/><span className=\"text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">{t('reports.amClasses')}</span></div>\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"><div className=\"w-4 h-4 bg-blue-500 rounded-lg shadow-sm\"/><span className=\"text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">{t('reports.noonClasses')}</span></div>\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"><div className=\"w-4 h-4 bg-blue-700 rounded-lg shadow-sm\"/><span className=\"text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">{t('reports.pmClasses')}</span></div>\n               </div>\n            </ReportCard>\n          </div>\n        </>\n      ) : (\n        <div className=\"space-y-8 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500\">\n           <div className=\"bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 p-8 rounded-[3rem] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm space-y-8\">\n              <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-6\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-5\">\n                  <div className=\"p-4 bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/30 text-amber-600 rounded-2xl\">\n                      <Calendar size={28} />\n                  </div>\n                  <div>\n                      <h2 className=\"text-xl font-black dark:text-white uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none\">{t('reports.birthdayMonth')}</h2>\n                      <p className=\"text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mt-2\">Selecione o período abaixo</p>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n\n              {/* Grid de Meses (Sem Scroll) */}\n              <div className=\"grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-6 gap-2 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 p-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-700\">\n                 {months.map((m, idx) => (\n                   <button \n                    key={m} \n                    onClick={() => setSelectedMonth(idx)}\n                    className={`py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${selectedMonth === idx ? 'bg-amber-500 text-white shadow-lg scale-105' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-700'}`}\n                   >\n                     {m.substring(0, 3)}\n                   </button>\n                 ))}\n              </div>\n           </div>\n\n           <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n              {monthlyBirthdays.length > 0 ? monthlyBirthdays.map((s) => (\n                <div key={s.id} className=\"bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 p-8 rounded-[3rem] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all group overflow-hidden relative\">\n                   <div className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 w-24 h-24 bg-amber-500/5 rounded-full blur-2xl -translate-y-1/2 translate-x-1/2\" />\n                   \n                   <div className=\"flex items-center gap-6 mb-6\">\n                      <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-black text-2xl text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 shadow-inner group-hover:rotate-6 transition-transform\">\n                        {new Date(s.birthDate).getDate()}\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[10px] font-black text-amber-600 uppercase tracking-widest\">Aniversário</p>\n                        <h4 className=\"text-lg font-black text-slate-900 dark:text-white uppercase tracking-tight leading-none mt-1\">{s.name}</h4>\n                      </div>\n                   </div>\n\n                   <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between pt-6 border-t border-slate-50 dark:border-slate-800\">\n                      <div className=\"flex flex-col\">\n                        <span className=\"text-[8px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">Programa</span>\n                        <span className=\"text-xs font-bold dark:text-slate-300 uppercase\">{s.isKid ? 'Kids' : 'Adulto'}</span>\n                      </div>\n                      <button className=\"p-3 bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/30 text-amber-600 rounded-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform\">\n                         <FileSpreadsheet size={18} />\n                      </button>\n                   </div>\n                </div>\n              )) : (\n                <div className=\"col-span-full py-32 text-center space-y-4\">\n                   <Cake size={64} className=\"mx-auto text-slate-200 dark:text-slate-800\" />\n                   <p className=\"text-slate-400 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest italic\">{t('reports.noBirthdays')}</p>\n                </div>\n              )}\n           </div>\n\n           <div className=\"bg-slate-900 rounded-[3rem] p-12 text-white flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-10 border border-white/5\">\n              <div className=\"space-y-4 text-center md:text-left\">\n                 <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter\">{t('reports.excelIntel')} - {months[selectedMonth]}</h3>\n                 <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm max-w-sm\">Baixe a lista completa de aniversariantes para organizar as homenagens no tatame.</p>\n              </div>\n              <button className=\"px-12 py-5 bg-amber-500 text-slate-900 rounded-[1.5rem] font-black uppercase text-xs tracking-widest shadow-2xl hover:bg-amber-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-3\">\n                 <Download size={20} /> Baixar Planilha PPH\n              </button>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Footer Insight Box */}\n      {activeReport === 'main' && (\n        <div className=\"bg-slate-900 rounded-[3.5rem] p-12 text-white flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-10 relative overflow-hidden border border-white/5 shadow-2xl\">\n          <div className=\"absolute -bottom-12 -left-12 w-64 h-64 bg-blue-600 rounded-full blur-[100px] opacity-20\" />\n          <div className=\"space-y-6 max-w-xl relative\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-4xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none\">{t('reports.proSuite')}</h3>\n            <p className=\"text-slate-400 font-medium leading-relaxed\">{t('reports.proDesc')}</p>\n            <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 pt-4\">\n               <button className=\"bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] transition-all flex items-center gap-3 border border-white/10\"><FileSpreadsheet size={18} className=\"text-green-500\"/> {t('reports.excelIntel')}</button>\n               <button className=\"bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] transition-all flex items-center gap-3 border border-white/10\"><FileText size={18} className=\"text-red-500\"/> {t('reports.pdfReport')}</button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <button className=\"bg-blue-600 text-white px-12 py-6 rounded-[2rem] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-xs shadow-2xl shadow-blue-500/40 hover:bg-blue-700 active:scale-95 transition-all relative\">{t('reports.generateCustom')}</button>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport default Reports;\n"
